description: Translate Mandarin luxury-retail enquiries into English for staff triage.
domain_relevance: Airport luxury boutiques often need quick local translation before boarding windows close.

test_cases.input: 这款手表有全球保修吗？
test_cases.expected: Does this watch come with a global warranty?
test_cases.notes: actual='Is this watch global warranty?' cosine=0.9023

test_cases.input: 我可以在登机前领取预订的香水吗？
test_cases.expected: Can I collect the reserved perfume before boarding?
test_cases.actual: Can I get the booked perfume before boarding?
test_cases.notes: actual='Can I get the booked perfume before boarding?' cosine=0.9005

test_cases.input: 这个包是机场限定款吗？
test_cases.expected: Is this bag an airport-exclusive edition?
test_cases.actual: Is this a limited amount for the airport?
test_cases.notes: actual='Is this a limited amount for the airport?' cosine=0.5702

application_name: Translate Mandarin luxury-retail enquiries into English for boutique and airport staff.
